description: Letter to Abu 'Ali, probably from his brother, inquiring about the lack of correspondence. The sender asks for an explanation, citing Leviticus 19:17. In the scribal hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi, active 1100-1138 CE. (Information from Mediterranean Society, V, pp. 294-295)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
